calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Continued To Jul-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan L. Piper, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Regent West Limited LP.
Brenda Carter, Bookkeper for Regent West Limited LP, was placed under oath and testified.
Klaus Bermeister, president for Regent West Limited LP, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Elvia A. Santos.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Cafe Do Brazil was filed on March 18, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant Elvia A. Santos on March 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 18, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Regent West Limited LP, and against the Defaulted Defendant Elvia A. Santos as follows:

Damages/Principal - $105,883.00.
Costs - $1,349.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $107,232.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jonathan L. Piper, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Regnet West Limited, LP
No other appearances.

After hearing, Plaintiff Regent West Limited LP's Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment is GRANTED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
